creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's not related to gitlab.
Since you use node 8 for npm, you must also use node 8 for yarn.

===>   gitlab-10.1.5_1 depends on package: yarn>=0.17.0 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/yarn-1.3.2_2.txz
[build] Installing yarn-1.3.2_2...
[build] `-- Installing node-9.2.1...
pkg-static: node-9.2.1 conflicts with node8-8.9.3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/node

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/yarn-1.3.2_2.txz
